hooks.name: config-protection
hooks.description: Blocks edits to linter, formatter, and build config files without human approval

hooks.name: gateguard-fact-force
hooks.description: Forces fact declaration before high-consequence actions (blocking in strict mode)
hooks.note: Set ECC_HOOK_PROFILE=strict to activate. Advisory in standard mode.

hooks.name: governance-capture
hooks.description: Logs governance events (secrets, approval-required commands) to governance-log.jsonl

hooks.name: pre-compact
hooks.description: Logs a compaction boundary marker to session file before context is compacted

hooks.name: session-end
hooks.description: Persists session summary to session file for cross-session continuity

hooks.name: suggest-compact
hooks.description: Suggests /compact when tool call count crosses threshold (default 40)

hooks.name: quality-gate
hooks.description: Runs formatter/linter after file edits; warns on failure
hooks.note: Set ECC_QUALITY_GATE_BLOCKING=true to make failures blocking

hooks.name: mcp-health-check
hooks.description: Probes MCP server health before any MCP tool call; blocks if unreachable

hooks.name: cost-tracker
hooks.description: Appends token usage and estimated cost to costs.jsonl after each session

minimal.description: Only hard safety blocks (no-verify guard). Use for quick explorations.

standard.description: Full governance + observability. Recommended for all regular development.

strict.description: Everything in standard plus GateGuard pre-action gate. Use for Class A changes.

environment.ECC_HOOK_PROFILE: Profile tier selector. Values: minimal | standard | strict. Default: standard.
environment.ECC_COMPACT_THRESHOLD: Tool call count before suggest-compact fires. Default: 40.
environment.ECC_QUALITY_GATE_BLOCKING: Set to 'true' to make quality-gate failures block edits. Default: false.
environment.MCP_SERVERS: Comma-separated 'name=healthUrl' pairs for mcp-health-check. Example: github=http://localhost:3100/health
